mapper.sql: id, user_id, product_id, product_name, product_image, price, quantity, selected, create_time, update_time
mapper.select: SELECT FROM cart WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND product_id = #{productId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO cart (user_id, product_id, product_name, product_image, price, quantity, selected) VALUES (#{userId}, #{productId}, #{productName}, #{productImage}, #{price}, #{quantity}, #{selected})
mapper.update: UPDATE cart SET quantity = #{quantity} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE cart SET selected = #{selected} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM cart WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND selected = 1

DELETE FROM cart WHERE id IN
#{id}
